summary:
Use this agent to generate marketing content. This includes blog posts, social media posts, video scripts, ad copy, landing page copy, and newsletter content. Examples:

<example>
Context: User needs blog content.
user: Write a blog post about productivity hacks
assistant: I'll use the content-creator agent to write the blog post
</example>

<example>
Context: User needs video script.
user: Create a script for our product demo video
assistant: I'll launch the content-creator agent to write the video script
</example>
title: content-creator
